strategy: Hit with Ice, he takes +50%, and never Fire (80% resist).
Kill the Ravenous Tooth minion early. Its Brilliant Light triggers his Link, and his cheats need him present anyway.
Expect a Brimstone Revenant on a random wizard every second round and an Efreet every fourth, so shield for Fire and heal off those beats.
At only 5,030 health, stack one round of Ice blades and burst him down before the Round 4 Efreet.
Use an Ice AoE to hit boss and minion together if you cannot split focus.
cheatNotes: His Ravenous Tooth casts Brilliant Light, which makes Kus'Bhid cast Link, kill the minion to break this loop.
The Link cheat does nothing if Kus'Bhid himself is gone.
He answers his minion by Power Linking a random wizard, buffing himself.
At the end of every second round he drops a Brimstone Revenant DoT on a random wizard.
At the end of every fourth round he casts Efreet on a random wizard, shield for Fire before Round 4.
